subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth the truth, and the Exposition calleth out, and the Mother Book from behind them both crieth aloud and declareth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق و البیان ینادی و ام الکتاب عن ورائهما یصیح و یقول
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
